# Verify

## Change Summary

- 

Use this check to verify the smallest practical result, and call out any assumptions that were not fully resolved before implementation.

## Status

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| behavior_check | `pass` / `partial` / `fail` |
| test_check | `pass` / `partial` / `fail` / `not-run` |
| regression_risk | `low` / `medium` / `high` |
| doc_sync_needed | `none` / `required` / `completed` |
| memory_candidate | `yes` / `no` |
| final_status | `passed` / `needs-follow-up` / `blocked` |
